prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You got this! Remember, everyone faces challenges and setbacks, but it's how you overcome them that matters. Take a deep breath, clear your mind and focus on the task at hand. Break it down into smaller, manageable steps, and take things one step at a time. You've got the skills and abilities required to tackle this challenge, so believe in yourself and get started. Good luck!
